_instructions: TEMPLATE — Copy this file to _data/<your-post-slug>.json and fill in your content. Then copy template.njk to <your-post-slug>.njk. Finally, add an entry to _data/writing.json.
title: Your Post Title Here
intro: Opening paragraph — hook the reader with the core problem or idea.
summaryParagraph: Second paragraph — expand on the intro with more context. Remove this key if you don't need it.
contextParagraph: Third paragraph — set the stage before diving into sections. Remove this key if you don't need it.

sections.heading: Section Heading
paragraphs: A paragraph with an inline link. HTML is supported here.

orderedList: Step two — do the next thing.
